title: SyncAuthMiddleware
content:
# SyncAuthMiddleware

Inherits from: httpx.Auth


Implements httpx auth.


## Methods


### __init__(conn: SyncAuthConnection) -> None


### sync_auth_flow(request: httpx.Request) -> Generator[httpx.Request, httpx.Response, None]
